## Proof

## Verification

- [ ] Narrow tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] `pnpm qa:core`
- [ ] Browser/a11y/visual checks when a public UI changes
- [ ] English and Japanese surfaces reviewed when user-facing copy changes
- [ ] No credentials, local agent state, or generated private reports are staged
- [ ] Performance, security, and accessibility impact documented
